message:
feat(core): incremental Tantivy ingestion from append-log checkpoints (wa-oegrb.4.2)

Implements the offset-driven indexer pipeline bridging the recorder
append-log with Tantivy lexical search. Includes AppendLogReader for
binary log scanning, document mapper for all event types, IndexWriter
trait for pluggable backends, IncrementalIndexer with checkpoint
coordination, and lag monitoring. 40 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
